notes: Source: BenQ EU spec page (most complete listing) cross-referenced with BenQ US spec page and the official LU9800/LU9750 Installation Guide PDF. HDMI grade (2.0) confirmed by projectorcentral.com. The 5x BNC Computer In 2 (R/G/B/H/V) are five individual BNC connectors for RGBHV/component analog video. 3D Sync connector type (3.5mm) inferred from BenQ LU9715 sibling-model spec page, which explicitly labels it as 3.5mm mini jack — not directly stated on the LU9800 spec page. The installation guide covers LU9750 and LU9800 together and mentions an AUDIO OUT (L/R) terminal; however, neither the US nor EU official spec pages list an audio output, so it was not included. Remote control firmware supports optional SDI and DisplayPort expansion inputs, but these are not listed as built-in I/O on any spec page and are omitted. Power inlet is standard IEC C14 (detachable cord); not explicitly labeled on spec page but confirmed by detachable region-specific power cord accessory listing and projector wattage class.

ports.note: 3.5mm mini earphone jack; 12V (+/-1.5V) screen/lift trigger, 200mA
